title: Aureline provider-account settings, seat and plan posture, cached/offline shadow disclosure, and account-switch audit vocabulary
description: Boundary schema for the provider_account_settings_record and account_switch_audit_record frozen in docs/integrations/provider_account_settings_contract.md. The settings record is the per-(connected_provider, surface) disclosure surfaces read before claiming which account, target, seat, plan, or cached-shadow posture is in effect; the audit record is the reviewable artifact that explains every account switch, default-target move, seat transition, session invalidation, or admin-policy retarget with explicit scope-change, affected-workflow, queued-draft, and provider-authority consequence disclosures. The schema composes with and does NOT replace the provider_account_state_record / project_or_board_mapping_record / offline_capture_control_record / account_switch_audit_hook_record vocabulary frozen in schemas/integrations/provider_mapping_state.schema.json; the existing vocabulary remains the source of truth for account_state_class, account_kind_class, seat_or_plan_state_class, session_freshness_class, scope_provenance_class, sync_mode_class, mapping_state_class, default_target_resolution_class, audit_hook_event_class, diagnostics_link_class, and surface_class. Raw URLs, raw OAuth tokens, raw delegated tokens, raw cookies, raw provider-private profile bodies, raw seat plans, raw billing payloads, and raw provider account profile bodies never cross this boundary. Adding a new account_binding_class, cached_offline_shadow_class, scope_change_class, affected_workflow_class, queued_draft_disclosure_class, or provider_authority_consequence_class value is additive-minor and requires a provider_account_settings_schema_version bump; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

provider_account_settings_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for this provider-account-settings vocabulary. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, export, cite from support packets, queue-review rows, admin-reconciliation rollups, and AI evidence packets. Raw URLs, raw OAuth tokens, raw delegated tokens, raw cookies, raw provider-private profile bodies, and raw billing payloads never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

reviewable_sentence.description: Short reviewable sentence safe for desktop, CLI, support-export, queue-review, admin-reconciliation, and AI evidence output.

provider_class.description: Provider class re-exported verbatim from schemas/integrations/provider_event.schema.json and schemas/integrations/provider_mapping_state.schema.json so settings rows project onto the same axis as ingested events and mapping records.

environment_class.description: Provider deployment environment re-exported verbatim from the provider-event and provider-mapping schemas.

surface_class.description: Provider-linked surface class re-exported from schemas/providers/publish_later_record.schema.json and the provider-mapping schema.

provider_actor_class.description: Provider-actor class re-exported from the connected-provider ADR vocabulary. A generic Connected state is forbidden; unknown_actor_class is repair-only.

trust_posture.description: Workspace trust state the settings or audit record was captured under.

redaction_class.description: Declared redaction class re-exported from the connected-provider ADR. Raw URLs, raw OAuth tokens, raw delegated tokens, raw cookies, raw provider-private profile bodies, raw billing or seat payloads, and raw export bodies never cross this boundary regardless of class.

account_state_class.description: Connected-provider account state re-exported verbatim from schemas/integrations/provider_mapping_state.schema.json.

account_kind_class.description: Typed mapping kind re-exported verbatim from schemas/integrations/provider_mapping_state.schema.json.

seat_or_plan_state_class.description: Seat or plan posture re-exported verbatim from schemas/integrations/provider_mapping_state.schema.json.

default_target_resolution_class.description: Default-target resolution class re-exported verbatim from schemas/integrations/provider_mapping_state.schema.json.

audit_hook_event_class.description: Audit-hook event class re-exported verbatim from schemas/integrations/provider_mapping_state.schema.json. The richer account_switch_audit_record reuses this discriminator and adds explicit scope-change, affected-workflow, queued-draft, and provider-authority consequence fields on top.

diagnostics_link_class.description: Diagnostics navigation class re-exported verbatim from schemas/integrations/provider_mapping_state.schema.json.

settings_record_ref.description: Opaque ref to the settings record the link resolves to. Empty when no concrete settings record exists yet.

provider_identity.description: Provider identity used for host, tenant, and mirror/self-host disambiguation. Re-uses the shape from schemas/integrations/provider_event.schema.json.

origin_disclosure.description: Canonical Aureline origin a settings or audit record was captured under.

policy_context.description: Policy context the record was captured under. A policy-epoch roll between capture and use re-evaluates the record; silent reuse under a drifted epoch is forbidden.

account_binding_class.description: Frozen settings-disclosure class for how the active provider account was bound. user_selected_active_account: a user explicitly chose this account for the surface. inherited_user_default_account: bound via the user's local default for this provider class. inherited_workspace_setting_account: bound via the Aureline workspace setting. inherited_repo_metadata_account: bound via repo-attached metadata (e.g., a tracked .aureline/provider-link.toml). inherited_org_mapping_account: bound via an inherited org mapping. admin_forced_account: org or workspace admin policy forces this account; the user cannot widen. expired_seat_local_only_continuity: provider seat expired or revoked; local-only continuity remains. grace_mode_read_only_continuity: provider returned a bounded grace window; read-only or limited-scope use only. local_only_no_account_bound: no account is bound; only metadata-safe local capture is admitted. cached_offline_shadow_only_no_live_account: provider unreachable; cached read-only shadow remains visible under metadata-safe defaults only. Surfaces MUST disclose this verbatim instead of collapsing to a generic Connected badge.

cached_offline_shadow_class.description: Frozen vocabulary describing why the surface is rendering against cached read-only shadow rather than a live provider account. cached_read_only_within_grace_window: provider returned a bounded grace window (seat or plan). cached_read_only_after_seat_expiry: seat expired or revoked. cached_read_only_after_session_invalid: session invalidated; no cached mutation admitted. cached_read_only_under_policy_block: admin policy denies the live action; cached read state remains visible. cached_read_only_after_connectivity_loss: provider unreachable; no live calls. cached_read_only_after_admin_account_remap: admin policy retargeted the account; the previously-bound account's cached state is held until the user reselects. not_in_cached_shadow: surface is rendering against a live, fresh account. Cached-shadow states MUST pin metadata_safe_export_only true so cached state never silently widens export, telemetry, or AI-evidence scope.

scope_change_class.description: Frozen disclosure of how the active scope changed across an account-switch audit event. Surfaces MUST cite this verbatim instead of inferring from whichever provider callback arrived most recently.

affected_workflow_class.description: Frozen vocabulary for which Aureline workflows the audited event impacts. The audit record MUST list every workflow class that loses or gains a target so reviewers can audit the blast radius without re-deriving it from individual surfaces.

queued_draft_disclosure_class.description: Frozen disclosure of what happened to publish-later queue items, browser-handoff packets, and offline-capture controls bound to the previous account or target. Loss of provider connectivity, seat expiry, account switch, or policy change MUST NOT erase prepared handoff state; this class is the audit anchor.

provider_authority_consequence_class.description: Frozen disclosure of how provider authority changed across the audited event. authority_continues_under_new_actor: the new account's actor class still admits the prior sync modes. authority_paused_until_session_repaired: session invalidation pauses mutation. authority_revoked_by_admin_policy: admin policy denies further mutation outright. authority_narrowed_by_admin_policy: some sync modes remain admissible; others were dropped. authority_lost_with_seat_expiry: mutation denied; cached read state may remain. authority_held_pending_account_resolution: parked behind a publish-later account_mapping_binding_record. authority_local_only_no_provider_authority: surface continues local-only. authority_held_in_cached_read_only_shadow: cached read shadow only, no mutation admitted.

binding_summary.description: Short reviewable sentence explaining how the account was bound (for example, Bound via repo-attached .aureline/provider-link.toml; admin policy did not narrow this account).

linked_account_mapping_binding_ref.description: Opaque ref to the publish-later account_mapping_binding_record currently in effect. Empty when account_binding_class is local_only_no_account_bound or cached_offline_shadow_only_no_live_account.

linked_inherited_source_ref.description: Opaque ref to the inheritance source (repo metadata file, user-default record, workspace setting record, org mapping record, admin policy record). Required for every inherited_* and admin_forced_account class; empty otherwise.

account_binding_disclosure.description: Reviewable settings-level disclosure of how the active provider account was bound for one (connected_provider, surface) pair. Surfaces MUST render this verbatim instead of collapsing to a generic Connected badge.

shadow_summary.description: Short reviewable sentence explaining why the surface is rendering against cached read-only shadow rather than a live account (for example, Provider unreachable since 2026-04-29T09:55:00Z; cached read state shown under metadata-safe defaults).

shadow_window_closes_at.description: Optional reviewable timestamp at which a bounded grace window or cached-shadow window closes. Null when the window is not bounded by an external clock.

cached_offline_shadow_disclosure.description: Reviewable disclosure of cached read-only shadow posture. cached_offline_shadow_class outside not_in_cached_shadow MUST pin metadata_safe_export_only true on the parent settings record.

linked_provider_account_state_record_ref.description: Opaque ref to the provider_account_state_record from schemas/integrations/provider_mapping_state.schema.json this settings record summarizes. Empty only when no surface-level account-state record has been minted yet (for example, account_kind_class local_only_fallback before any provider has been consulted).

actor_class_in_effect.description: Provider-actor class currently bound to this settings record. unknown_actor_class is repair-only.

actor_subject_ref.description: Opaque ref to the resolved actor subject. Empty when no subject has been confirmed.

seat_or_plan_summary.description: Short reviewable sentence describing the seat or plan posture (for example, Plan does not include status-transition sync). Never a raw billing payload.

default_target_explanation.description: Short reviewable sentence explaining how the active default target was resolved (for example, Inherited from repository metadata).

linked_default_target_resolution_record_.description: Opaque refs to default_target_resolution_records (one per target_context_class) that explain the per-context default target chosen under this settings record. Empty when account_kind_class is local_only_fallback or cached_offline_shadow_only_no_live_account is in effect.

preserved_handoff_state_refs.description: Opaque refs to publish-later queue items, browser-handoff packets, offline-capture controls, or imported snapshots preserved by this settings record across connectivity loss, account switch, seat expiry, or policy change. Loss of provider connectivity MUST NOT erase prepared handoff state.

metadata_safe_export_only.description: When true, provider-derived rows under this settings record may only be exported with metadata-safe defaults regardless of any wider redaction class. Cached-shadow state, policy_blocked state, expired_seat continuity, and offline_with_cached_read_state MUST raise this to true rather than silently widening export, telemetry, or AI-evidence scope.

diagnostics_links.description: Diagnostics navigation the surface MAY render so the user can repair, reauth, switch account, review admin policy, or open the offline-capture inbox.

allOf.description: account_kind_class admin_forced_target MUST disclose admin_forced_account binding and resolve default_target_resolution_class to admin_forced.
account_kind_class inherited_account MUST disclose one of the inherited_* binding classes.
account_kind_class active_account MUST disclose user_selected_active_account binding.
account_kind_class expired_seat MUST disclose expired_seat_local_only_continuity binding and pair with seat_or_plan_state_class seat_expired or seat_revoked.
account_kind_class grace_mode MUST disclose grace_mode_read_only_continuity binding and pair with seat_or_plan_state_class seat_grace.
account_kind_class local_only_fallback MUST disclose local_only_no_account_bound binding and resolve default_target_resolution_class to no_default_local_only_fallback.
account_state_class offline_with_cached_read_state MUST disclose a cached_offline_shadow_class outside not_in_cached_shadow and pin metadata_safe_export_only true.
account_state_class policy_blocked MUST pin metadata_safe_export_only true.
cached_offline_shadow_class not_in_cached_shadow MUST pair with account_state_class signed_in or limited_scope.
cached_offline_shadow_class outside not_in_cached_shadow MUST pin metadata_safe_export_only true.

provider_account_settings_record.description: Settings-level disclosure of one connected-provider account binding for one provider-backed surface. The record is the per-(connected_provider, surface) row a settings reader, support export, queue review, AI-evidence packet, or admin reconciliation surface reads to explain which account is in effect, why, under which seat/plan posture, with which cached/offline shadow disclosure, and against which default-target resolution. Surfaces MUST NOT collapse this record into a generic Connected badge or invent per-surface 'auto-detected account' copy.

linked_audit_hook_record_ref.description: Opaque ref to the lighter account_switch_audit_hook_record from schemas/integrations/provider_mapping_state.schema.json this richer audit record extends. Empty only when no hook record was minted (for example, when the audit was reconstructed from imported evidence).

from_account_binding_class.description: Account-binding class in effect before the event. Empty only when no prior binding existed; a previous local_only_no_account_bound binding MUST be cited verbatim.

to_account_binding_class.description: Account-binding class in effect after the event.

from_actor_subject_ref.description: Opaque ref to the actor subject in effect before the event. Empty when from_actor_class is unknown_actor_class or no prior subject was ever bound.

to_actor_subject_ref.description: Opaque ref to the actor subject in effect after the event. Empty when to_actor_class is unknown_actor_class (for example, fall back to local_only_fallback).

scope_change_summary.description: Short reviewable sentence explaining the scope change verbatim. Required so reviewers can audit the user-visible delta without re-deriving it from individual mappings.

affected_workflow_classes.description: Workflow classes the audited event impacts. The list MUST include no_workflows_affected when nothing was impacted; otherwise it MUST list every typed workflow class so reviewers can audit blast radius.

queued_draft_summary.description: Short reviewable sentence explaining what happened to publish-later queue items, browser-handoff packets, offline-capture controls, and other prepared drafts at the moment of the audited event.

provider_authority_summary.description: Short reviewable sentence explaining how provider authority changed (for example, Mutation paused until session is repaired; cached read state remains).

affected_mapping_refs.description: Opaque refs to project_or_board_mapping_records this audit record may have invalidated, narrowed, or parked.

preserved_handoff_state_refs.description: Opaque refs to publish-later queue items, browser-handoff packets, offline-capture controls, or imported snapshots preserved across this event. Empty list permitted only when queued_draft_disclosure_class is no_queued_drafts.

linked_account_mapping_binding_ref.description: Opaque ref to the publish-later account_mapping_binding_record this event minted or transitioned.

linked_default_target_resolution_record_.description: Opaque refs to default_target_resolution_records that were re-resolved as a consequence of this event.

rationale_summary.description: Short reviewable sentence explaining why the event happened (for example, Admin policy narrowed default target to the triage board; previous user-default mapping is held).

allOf.description: account_switched MUST cite a non-empty to_account_binding_class and a non-empty queued_draft_disclosure_class.
admin_policy_changed_target MUST cite at least one affected_mapping_ref and resolve to_default_target_resolution_class to admin_forced.
seat_state_changed MUST disclose either authority_lost_with_seat_expiry, authority_lost_with_seat_revoked, authority_continues_under_new_actor, or authority_held_in_cached_read_only_shadow.
queued_draft_disclosure_class no_queued_drafts MUST pair with an empty preserved_handoff_state_refs list.
queued_draft_disclosure_class outside no_queued_drafts MUST cite at least one preserved_handoff_state_ref.

account_switch_audit_record.description: Reviewable account-switch audit record extending account_switch_audit_hook_record with explicit scope-change, affected-workflow, queued-draft, and provider-authority consequence disclosures so reviewers can audit the blast radius of an account or default-target change without re-deriving it from individual surfaces. Default targets and account switches MUST be explainable from this record rather than inferred from whichever provider callback arrived most recently.
